meaning: n.扫帚,毛掸子,搅拌器,打蛋器,拂vt.扫,拂,挥动,迅速移动,搅拌vi.飞奔
examples: Whisk the batter with a wire whisk or hand beater until it is smooth and light.
Whisk until the chocolate is melted.
Whisk together the oil, vinegar and mustard in a medium bowl until well combined.
Reduce the heat and whisk in the butter in piece by piece until melted.
Nine elevators will be available to whisk the family and their guests through the mega- mansion.
